description_long: This is a modern set of three desks or tables, each featuring a rectangular stone or concrete top supported by a sleek, gold-colored metal frame. The set includes one larger central desk and two smaller side tables, all with open geometric bases that create a light, airy appearance. The tops have a smooth, slightly mottled texture, suggesting a polished stone or engineered surface. The gold metal frames are thin yet sturdy, forming clean right angles and open rectangles beneath each tabletop. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with no visible drawers, handles, or additional features. This set is well-suited for upscale urban environments, such as lobbies, lounges, or outdoor patios.
description: A modern set of three desks or tables with stone tops and gold metal frames, featuring a minimalist, geometric design. The set includes one large central desk and two smaller side tables.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three desks aligned, highlighting the rectangular stone tops and gold metal frames.
description_view_1: Angled view from the left, emphasizing the depth of the central desk and the open geometric bases of the side tables.
description_view_2: Direct rear view, clearly displaying the tops and the symmetry of the set, with all three desks visible.
description_view_3: Angled view from the right, showing the texture of the stone tops and the open structure of the frames.
attribute_orientation: The intended user-facing side is the longer edge of the central desk, with the two smaller side tables flanking it on either side. The open frame bases and smooth tops indicate the front and sides.
attribute_usage_context: casual seating area table set for socializing, placing drinks, or light work in an urban lounge or patio
